raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Self-commitment declaration that orients the speaker toward concrete behavioral follow-through",
  "implicit_claims": ["vague resolutions are inherently uncarryable", "small observable changes are reliably executable by the speaker", "the speaker can accurately distinguish executable from non-executable goals"],
  "coherence_assessment": "Coherent; the contrast between 'small/observable' and 'vague' is logically consistent and presupposes a binary of feasibility",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "Speaker must possess (a) accurate self-knowledge of what is executable and (b) consistent follow-through on the named small changes",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "Speaker uses the statement to substitute micro-changes for needed larger action or to retroactively rationalize non-performance"
}
